description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs that triggers on push to the master branch. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, setting up .NET Core 3.1.102 and Node.js 10.x. It should then publish documentation to a gh-pages branch, deploy to GitHub Pages, package a nightly NuGet package, publish it to NuGet, sync the repository to Gitee, and reload Gitee Pages.
